## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix

- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Docs / comments

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (typecheck + lint + test + build)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for every behaviour change
- [ ] Docs updated in `docs/` and `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] No new untyped `any` or `@ts-ignore` without comment
- [ ] API keys / secrets not hardcoded or committed
- [ ] PR is focused on one concern (split if not)
